name: Whale Alert
description: Real-time alerts on large cryptocurrency transactions across major blockchains — BTC, ETH, USDT, USDC, BNB, TRX, XRP, and more. Whale movements (especially USDT/USDC into exchanges) often precede market moves; this is the primary public source for that signal. Free tier: last 1 hour of data, 10 req/min, 100 req/hr. Sign up at https://whale-alert.io/signup.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: From your Whale Alert dashboard. Free tier covers last 1 hour of data only — paid tiers go back further.

tools.name: list_transactions
tools.description: Recent large crypto transactions across supported chains. Filter by min_value (USD), currency (btc, eth, usdt, usdc, ...), and start/end timestamps. Each row carries blockchain, hash, from + to (address + owner_type: exchange/wallet/unknown), symbol, amount, amount_usd, transaction_type (transfer/mint/burn). Cluster of USDT/USDC moving INTO Binance/Coinbase frequently precedes selling pressure.

start.description: Unix-seconds lower bound — at most 1h ago on free tier.

min_value.description: Minimum USD value for inclusion. Default 500000. Bigger = sharper signal, fewer noise rows.

currency.description: Filter to one currency code — btc, eth, usdt, usdc, bnb, xrp, ada, doge, sol, etc. Omit for all.

tools.name: get_transaction
tools.description: Lookup one transaction by its blockchain + hash. Returns the same row shape as list_transactions for that specific tx. Use to drill into a tx that surfaced via another channel (a tweet, an alert, etc.).

blockchain.description: Chain name — bitcoin, ethereum, tron, ripple, binancechain, etc.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Service health + supported blockchains + currencies list. Use to discover what's available before filtering.
